rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the component type scope when the contract refers to component ports
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Preserve the AADL architecture by not introducing new subcomponents or connections through annex blocks
generic_rules: Maintain the existing AADL component hierarchy and connections
Ensure all AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid scopes
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless they are represented through variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to enclose AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation scope
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in invalid scopes
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not introduce new subcomponents or connections through AGREE annex blocks
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
